description_long: This is a cylindrical medicine container with a blue snap-on lid and a predominantly white body. The front features the brand name 'illuma' in gold letters, accompanied by a large, stylized droplet graphic composed of yellow and orange spheres, suggesting a premium or specialized formula. The side of the container displays green icons and the number '2', likely indicating a stage or dosage, along with placeholder text in gray. The back is covered with dense gray text, simulating product information or instructions. The container appears to be made of rigid plastic, suitable for storing powdered or granular medicine, and is designed for easy handling and resealing. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and intended for consumer healthcare use.
description: A white cylindrical medicine container with a blue lid, gold branding, and a large droplet graphic, designed for healthcare use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'illuma' branding, droplet graphic, and green dosage icon.
description_view_1: Side view with partial branding and green dosage icon visible, blue lid prominent.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by dense gray text, blue lid visible.
description_view_3: Side-back view showing the edge of the droplet graphic and product information text.
